page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9i.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture compute-optimized server instance managed via the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores with 128 vCPUs, utilizing Intel Xeon 6982P-C processors running at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of memory per core.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring external block storage solutions for data persistence. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 36 Gbps. There are no integrated GPUs, and the configuration does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The dedicated CPU allocation with one thread per physical core ensures consistent compute performance without hyper-threading overhead, though the 2.0 GB per core memory ratio represents a tradeoff for memory-intensive workloads.

Given the high core count, dedicated CPU allocation, and 3.2 GHz clock speed, the ecs.c9i.32xlarge is designed for compute-heavy workloads. Suitable applications include high-performance computing, batch processing, intensive scientific modeling, and large-scale web serving or application hosting where CPU performance is the primary bottleneck.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9i.32xlarge is a compute-optimized server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs using Intel Xeon 6982P-C processors operating at 3.2 GHz. The system includes 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB. This instance does not feature local storage or integrated GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 36 Gbps. With a dedicated CPU allocation and single-threaded cores, it is designed to deliver stable, high-throughput compute performance. The ecs.c9i.32xlarge is suited for compute-intensive workloads such as high-performance computing, batch processing, and large-scale application hosting.

tagline: A high-core-count compute-optimized instance featuring dedicated physical processors and high-speed networking for demanding parallel workloads.
